channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 9 Indian Fishermen Arrested By Sri Lankan Navy

media:content.media:description: Fishermen from both countries are frequently arrested for trespassing waters. (Representational)

item.description: The nine arrested fishermen and their seized trawler were handed over to the Fisheries Inspector of Mannar for further legal proceedings, the Navy said.
item.content:encoded: The nine arrested fishermen and their seized trawler were handed over to the Fisheries Inspector of Mannar for further legal proceedings, the Navy said.

item.title: 'Will Ask Shehbaz Sharif To Make Me PM': Nawaz Sharif's New PoK 'Desire'

media:content.media:description: JAAC has called for a mega protest in the region today.

item.description: Sharif claimed PoK was as important for him as his home province, Punjab. "It is my second home. My ancestors migrated from Kashmir."
item.content:encoded: Sharif claimed PoK was as important for him as his home province, Punjab. "It is my second home. My ancestors migrated from Kashmir."

item.title: 'PPE Funds To Buy Rolexes, Cars': Indian-Origin Couple's Covid Fraud In UK

media:content.media:description: The fraudsters claimed they could supply millions of boxes of nitrile gloves

item.description: The NCA's investigation found bank records showing Bhandari and his wife used the money to buy Rolexes, jewellery, holiday packages, and cars.
item.content:encoded: The NCA's investigation found bank records showing Bhandari and his wife used the money to buy Rolexes, jewellery, holiday packages, and cars.

item.title: This Epic 3500 Km Walking Trail Takes Hikers Across Six Countries

media:content.media:description: The new Wolf Trail is expected to attract long distance hikers.

item.description: A new 3,494 km hiking route called the Wolf Trail has opened across six European countries, offering experienced walkers a journey from Poland to Italy that can take up to six months to complete.
item.content:encoded: A new 3,494 km hiking route called the Wolf Trail has opened across six European countries, offering experienced walkers a journey from Poland to Italy that can take up to six months to complete.

item.title: FBI Arrests Indian National Harmanveer Singh In Drug Trafficking Case

media:content.media:description: The FBI has arrested Harmanveer Singh, an Indian national, for his alleged role in drug trafficking

item.description: Officers with the California Highway Patrol arrested Harmanveer Singh in Stockton on Tuesday, weeks after a federal warrant was issued in June.
item.content:encoded: Officers with the California Highway Patrol arrested Harmanveer Singh in Stockton on Tuesday, weeks after a federal warrant was issued in June.

item.title: Trump's 50% Tariff Threat May Hurt Canada But Could Be Negotiation Tactic: Experts

media:content.media:description: The US threat of 50% tariffs on Canadian goods will have a ripple effect on the country's economy

item.description: Desjardins economist Randall Bartlett estimates the tariffs could shave two to three tenths of a percent off Canada's growth in 2026 and 2027.
item.content:encoded: Desjardins economist Randall Bartlett estimates the tariffs could shave two to three tenths of a percent off Canada's growth in 2026 and 2027.

item.title: Tesla Profit Falls As Musk Ramps Up Spending On AI, Robotaxis

media:content.media:description: Musk says Tesla's ambitious robotaxi and AI infrastructure spending will pay off.

item.description: Tesla's second-quarter profit dropped 12% as R&D spending jumped 49%, even as revenue and vehicle sales beat Wall Street expectations
item.content:encoded: Tesla's second-quarter profit dropped 12% as R&D spending jumped 49%, even as revenue and vehicle sales beat Wall Street expectations

item.title: British Airways Launches Probe After 3 Pilots Fall Sick Mid-Air After Hyderabad Stopover

media:content.media:description: The incident involved British Airways flight BA276, which departed Hyderabad for London.

item.description: The airline is now reviewing its hotel arrangements in Hyderabad as part of the investigation while authorities work to establish what led to the suspected food poisoning.
item.content:encoded: The airline is now reviewing its hotel arrangements in Hyderabad as part of the investigation while authorities work to establish what led to the suspected food poisoning.

item.title: Iran-US War News Highlights: US Strikes Iran For 12th Consecutive Night

media:content.media:description: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has largely stalled

item.description: US-Iran War News Highlights: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Highlights: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: Iran-US War Live: Houthis Attack Saudi Tankers In Red Sea As US Hits Iran Again
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump had threatened to destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant for every attack on shipping in Hormuz, drawing an "eye for an eye" warning from Tehran as both sides sharpened threats in the escalating war.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump had threatened to destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant for every attack on shipping in Hormuz, drawing an "eye for an eye" warning from Tehran as both sides sharpened threats in the escalating war.

item.title: $290 Million Worth Of Cocaine Found Hidden In Banana Shipment In Italy

media:content.media:description: Authorities estimated the drugs could have been worth around $290 million.

item.description: Italian authorities have seized around 1,700 pounds of high-purity cocaine worth nearly $290 million that was hidden inside a refrigerated banana shipment from Ecuador.
item.content:encoded: Italian authorities have seized around 1,700 pounds of high-purity cocaine worth nearly $290 million that was hidden inside a refrigerated banana shipment from Ecuador.

item.title: 'No One Will Sell Oil If Tehran Can't': Iran's Big Warning To US, Middle East

media:content.media:description: Ghalibaf said the conflict had become an "all or none" equation.

item.description: The remarks came after US President Donald Trump warned that American forces will destroy one bridge or power plant each time Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The remarks came after US President Donald Trump warned that American forces will destroy one bridge or power plant each time Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: US Announces Landmark Nuclear Deal With Saudi Arabia

media:content.media:description: US on Wednesday announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi.

item.description: The United States on Wednesday announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi Arabia.
item.content:encoded: The United States on Wednesday announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Why New York's Zohran Mamdani Cannot Arrest Netanyahu. What The Law Says

media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani on Tuesday said he had concluded he had no such authority to arrest Netanyahu.

item.description: The International Criminal Court, based in The Hague, issued an arrest warrant for Netanyahu in 2024 for alleged war crimes during the Gaza war. Israel rejects the court's jurisdiction and denies committing war crimes.
item.content:encoded: The International Criminal Court, based in The Hague, issued an arrest warrant for Netanyahu in 2024 for alleged war crimes during the Gaza war. Israel rejects the court's jurisdiction and denies committing war crimes.

item.title: US Says It's Carrying Out 12th Night Of Strikes On Iran

media:content.media:description: The US military announced Wednesday that it was conducting a 12th night of strikes.

item.description: The US military said Wednesday it had launched a fresh wave of strikes targeting Iranian military infrastructure, marking the twelfth night in a row it had attacked Iran.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1131686/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The US military said Wednesday it had launched a fresh wave of strikes targeting Iranian military infrastructure, marking the twelfth night in a row it had attacked Iran.

item.title: US House Approves $95 Billion Budget Plan With Iran War Funding

media:content.media:description: The measure was narrowly approved in a 216-214 vote and now heads to the Senate.

item.description: The US House of Representatives approved a $95 billion budget framework on Wednesday, with most of the funding earmarked for the Pentagon to fund the war against Iran.
item.content:encoded: The US House of Representatives approved a $95 billion budget framework on Wednesday, with most of the funding earmarked for the Pentagon to fund the war against Iran.

item.title: Terrorism Trial Opens In Stabbing Of Author Salman Rushdie

media:content.media:description: It's a second trial for Hadi Matar, who was found guilty in a New York state attempted murder case.

item.description: The man convicted of trying to kill Salman Rushdie spent years researching the writer's whereabouts before stabbing him on a lecture stage, federal prosecutors said Wednesday at the opening of his federal terrorism trial.
item.content:encoded: The man convicted of trying to kill Salman Rushdie spent years researching the writer's whereabouts before stabbing him on a lecture stage, federal prosecutors said Wednesday at the opening of his federal terrorism trial.

item.title: "Eye For An Eye": Iran Warns Of Forceful Response To US Strike

media:content.media:description: Abbas Araghchi said Wednesday that Iran would respond in kind to any attack on its infrastructure.

item.description: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Wednesday that Iran would respond in kind to any attack on its infrastructure, after Washington threatened to bomb a bridge or power plant for every ship targeted in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Wednesday that Iran would respond in kind to any attack on its infrastructure, after Washington threatened to bomb a bridge or power plant for every ship targeted in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran Strikes On CIA Facilities Prompt Questions About Possible Russian Role
item.description: Iranian drone attacks on CIA facilities in the Gulf have prompted US intelligence analysts to investigate whether Russia assisted by providing targeting information or advanced drone technology, said four people familiar with US intelligence.
item.content:encoded: Iranian drone attacks on CIA facilities in the Gulf have prompted US intelligence analysts to investigate whether Russia assisted by providing targeting information or advanced drone technology, said four people familiar with US intelligence.

item.title: Trump's Saudi Nuclear Pact Opens Door To Uranium Enrichment. What's At Stake

media:content.media:description: The proposed agreement is expected to be sent to the US Congress soon

item.description: The agreement leaves out two safeguards Washington has traditionally insisted on. First, a ban on uranium enrichment and spent fuel reprocessing, along with an "additional protocol" that provides tougher international inspections.
item.content:encoded: The agreement leaves out two safeguards Washington has traditionally insisted on. First, a ban on uranium enrichment and spent fuel reprocessing, along with an "additional protocol" that provides tougher international inspections.
